query:
INSERT INTO agents (ownerId, agentName, developerName, description, capabilities, endpointUrl, averageLatency, pricingModel, status, connectionTested, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
(1, 'Market Research Agent', 'AgenThinkMesh', 'Delivers structured market intelligence including market size, growth trajectory, competitive landscape, key trends, and risk analysis for institutional decision-makers.', '["market research","industry analysis","competitive intelligence","market sizing","trend analysis"]', 'https://4000-ite58n70udx243qagg7nd-4d7ca83c.sg1.manus.computer/agents/market-research/run', 5000, 'free', 'active', true, NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 'Financial Analysis Agent', 'AgenThinkMesh', 'Provides rigorous financial analysis including valuation, key ratios, cash flow assessment, and risk factors for institutional investors, fund managers, and analysts.', '["financial analysis","valuation","due diligence","investment analysis","risk assessment","portfolio analysis"]', 'https://4000-ite58n70udx243qagg7nd-4d7ca83c.sg1.manus.computer/agents/financial-analysis/run', 5000, 'free', 'active', true, NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 'Strategy Agent', 'AgenThinkMesh', 'Delivers strategic analysis and board-ready recommendations including strategic options, competitive positioning, and execution risk assessment for senior decision-makers.', '["strategy","strategic planning","competitive analysis","business strategy","market entry","growth strategy"]', 'https://4000-ite58n70udx243qagg7nd-4d7ca83c.sg1.manus.computer/agents/strategy/run', 5000, 'free', 'active', true, NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 'Legal Review Agent', 'AgenThinkMesh', 'Identifies legal risks, flags non-standard clauses, and provides structured legal analysis across contract review, jurisdiction assessment, and regulatory compliance.', '["legal review","contract analysis","risk flagging","compliance","regulatory analysis","clause extraction"]', 'https://4000-ite58n70udx243qagg7nd-4d7ca83c.sg1.manus.computer/agents/legal-review/run', 2000, 'free', 'active', true, NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 'Report Writer Agent', 'AgenThinkMesh', 'Synthesises research and analysis into polished, publication-ready reports with executive summaries, key findings, and structured recommendations for institutional audiences.', '["report writing","synthesis","executive summary","documentation","presentation","analysis writing"]', 'https://4000-ite58n70udx243qagg7nd-4d7ca83c.sg1.manus.computer/agents/report-writer/run', 5000, 'free', 'active', true, NOW(), NOW());
